provisions.title: Any foreign exchange operations and, in general, any operations carried out between
For the enforcement of this law, the following shall be considered as foreign exchange:
provisions.content: For the enforcement of this law, the following shall be considered as foreign exchange:

provisions.title: The following shall be considered as residents:
The following shall be considered as nonresidents:
1. . There shall be no restrictions on foreign exchange operations through book entry including
provisions.content:
purchases and sales of foreign exchange on the foreign exchange market, transfers, all kinds of
international settlements, and capital flows in foreign or domestic currency, between Cambodia and the
rest of the world or between residents and nonresidents. However, such operations shall be undertaken
solely through authorized intermediaries.
1. Only banks permanently established in the Kingdom of Cambodia shall be considered as authorized
intermediaries.
3. Authorized intermediaries shall be required, under conditions established by regulations, to provide the
Central Bank on a regular basis with periodic statements, by type of transfers or settlement and of
outflows and inflows of capital carried out between the Kingdom of Cambodia and the rest of the world,
according to the time set by the Central Bank.
4. Any export of cash in foreign currency by authorized intermediaries shall be subject to prior declaration
to the Central Bank.
5. The manual money changers who have fixed or moving counter may exercise their exchange transaction
with the prior authorization of the Central Bank.

provisions.title: In case of foreign exchange crisis, the Central Bank may issue regulations to be
provisions.content:
implemented for a maximum period of 3 months, imposing certain temporary restrictions on the

activity of authorized intermediaries, particularly on the transactions stated in Article 5 of the present

law, or their foreign exchange position, or any loans in domestic currency extended to nonresidents. In

case of having to prolong the scheme, the Central Bank together with the Ministry of Economy and

Finance shall submit a request to the Head of the Royal Government for approval.

provisions.title: Residents may hold foreign currencies freely, both in form and location of such holdings
provisions.content:
inside the country. Nevertheless, in case of foreign exchange crisis, the Central Bank may issue

regulations to be implemented for a maximum period of 3 months, suspending temporally the

enforcement of this provisions. In case of having to prolong the scheme, the Central Bank together

with the Ministry of Economy and Finance shall submit a request to the Head of the Royal
Government for approval.

provisions.title: Exporters or importers of goods and services shall make payments for their commercial
provisions.content: transactions with the rest of the world through authorized intermediaries.

provisions.title: Authorized intermediaries may be required by the Central Bank to submit proof of payment
provisions.content:
for imports by banker’s order in support of their applications to purchase foreign exchange, and later be

also required to provide various administrative evidence confirming the entry of goods into the country.

provisions.title: Since the collection is made, the proceeds from export of goods or services shall be
provisions.content:
credited to the exporter’s account with the domiciled bank in accordance with Article 8 of the present

law.

provisions.title: Counterpart funds in domestic currency from the local marketing of products imported on
provisions.content:
the basis of external borrowings or grants must be credited to the National Treasury’s account with the
Central Bank, in accordance with procedures to be defined by mutual agreement between the National

Treasury and the Central Bank.

provisions.title: The import or export of raw gold, uncut precious stones or other raw precious metals shall
provisions.content:
be free, in accordance with point 1 of Article 5 of the present law, however, shall be subject to prior

declaration to the Central Bank if the value of each transaction equals or exceeds ten thousand US
dollars (USD 10,000).

provisions.title: The export or import of the means of payment equaling or exceeding ten thousand US
provisions.content:
dollars (USD 10,000) in foreign exchange or the equivalent amount in domestic currency by a traveler

shall be declared to the customs officers at border crossings of the Kingdom of Cambodia.

The export of cash in excess of the limit set by the regulation of the Central Bank shall be subject to
prior examination by the Central Bank.

The Customs House shall transmit a copy of each such declaration to the Central Bank on a monthly
basis.

provisions.title: The capital flows related to foreign investment in the Kingdom of Cambodia shall be
provisions.content: governed by the Investment Law of the Kingdom of Cambodia.

provisions.title: In so far as liquidation of foreign investment takes place in accordance with the provisions of
provisions.content:
the Investment Law of the Kingdom of Cambodia, proceeds from said liquidation may be transferred

freely.

provisions.title: Investment made abroad by resident for an amount equaling or exceeding one hundred
provisions.content: thousand US dollars (USD 100,000) shall be subject to prior declaration to the Central Bank.

provisions.title: Transfers relating to investment or liquidation of investment shall be made through
provisions.content:
authorized intermediaries as stated in Article 5 of the present law.

Subsequently, the authorized intermediaries shall report to the Central Bank the amount of each

transfer equaling or exceeding one hundred thousand US dollars (USD 100,000).

provisions.title: Loans and borrowings, including trade credits may be freely contracted between residents
provisions.content:
and nonresidents, provided that the loans disbursements and repayments thereof are made through

authorized intermediary.

provisions.title: The capital flows resulted from those operations (settlements of import and export of goods
provisions.content:
or services, transfers, investment, loans and borrowings) shall include in the bank periodic statements in

accordance with the provisions as stated in point 3 of Article 5 of the present law. Such capital flows

shall be classified by category of each operation and the professional secrecy shall be respected.

provisions.title: Authorized intermediaries shall be responsible, with caution, for ensuring compliance with
provisions.content:
the provisions set forth in the present law or in regulations of the Central Bank concerning the
operations undertaken by themselves or placed under their control.

Any authorized intermediary who fails to comply with the provisions of the above paragraph shall be
punished in accordance with the existing laws.

provisions.title: Any person who violates points 3, 4, or 5 of Article 5 or violates Article 17 of the present
provisions.content:
law shall be liable for imprisonment from one year to five years and for a fine from one million Riels
(1,000,000) to ten million Riels (10,000,000 ), or any one of these two punishments.

provisions.title: Any person who violates Article 11 or paragraph 1 of Article 13 of the present law shall be
provisions.content: liable for a fine of ten per cent (10%) of the amount involved.

provisions.title: Any person who violates Article 12 or Article 16 of the present law shall be liable for a fine
provisions.content: of twenty per cent (20%) of the amount involved.

provisions.title: Any person who violates paragraph 2 of Article 13 of the present law shall be liable for a
provisions.content:
fine from one million Riels (1,000,000) to ten million Riels (10.000.000). Equipments used in the

perpretration of the violation shall be confiscated and retained as state property.

provisions.title: Any person who violates point 1 of Article 5 or Article 8 or Article 18 of the present law
provisions.content: shall be liable for a fine of fifty per cent (50%) of the amount involved.

provisions.title: All provisions contrary to this law are hereby repealed.
provisions.content:
Made in Phnom Penh, 22 August 1997

In the name and on behalf of the King

Acting Chief of State

Signature

CHEA SIM

First Prime Minister Second Prime Minister

Ung Huot Hun Sen
